case_title: ALLEN STOWERS VS. WELLS FARGO & WACHOVIA BANK 75 1ST S.F. CA.

docket_entries.description: FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF ALLEN STOWERS FILED ON 6/29/12 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOWERS, ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & WACHOVIA BANK 75 1ST S.F. CA. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-28-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-13-2012
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF STOWERS, ALLEN
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-01-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ALLEN STOWERS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
